---
title: "firestore_preprocessing"
author: "Ken Isaka"
date: "2026-07-08"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Data Preprocessing

Data preprocessing of .json file from Firestore.

```{r load-and-flatten}
# install.packages(c("jsonlite", "dplyr", "tidyr", "purrr"))

library(jsonlite)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(lmtest)

# Load raw JSON — simplifyVector = FALSE preserves irregular arrays as lists
raw_data <- fromJSON("firestore_export.json", simplifyVector = FALSE)

cat("Users:", length(raw_data$users), "\n")
cat("GameLogs:", length(raw_data$gameLogs), "\n")

# ── Flatten users ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
users_df <- tibble(
  document_id = names(raw_data$users),
  data = raw_data$users
) %>%
  unnest_wider(data)

# List columns on users:
#   puzzleOrder   — array of puzzle id strings  → comma-separated string
#   resumeRounds  — array of round numbers (empty for single-session users) → comma-separated or NA
#   breakLog      — array of {timestamp, duration} maps → derive breaksTaken + totalBreakTime scalars
users_df <- users_df %>%
  mutate(
    puzzleOrder    = map_chr(puzzleOrder,
                             ~ paste(.x, collapse = ",")),
    resumeRounds   = map_chr(resumeRounds,
                             ~ if (length(.x) == 0) NA_character_ else paste(.x, collapse = ",")),
    breaksTaken    = map_int(breakLog,
                             ~ if (is.null(.x)) 0L else length(.x)),
    totalBreakTime = map_dbl(breakLog,
                             ~ if (is.null(.x)) 0 else sum(map_dbl(.x, "duration"), na.rm = TRUE))
  ) %>%
  select(-breakLog)

# ── Flatten gameLogs ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
gamelogs_df <- tibble(
  document_id = names(raw_data$gameLogs),
  data = raw_data$gameLogs
) %>%
  unnest_wider(data)

# rawSubmissionTimestamps is a variable-length list; drop it for the master join.
gamelogs_df <- gamelogs_df %>%
  select(-rawSubmissionTimestamps)

# ── Master join ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Drop treatment/isReplay from gameLogs (canonical copies live on users).
# sessionComplete is on users (true once all 5 puzzles done), not on gamelogs.
experiment_master <- gamelogs_df %>%
  select(-treatment, -isReplay) %>%
  left_join(users_df, by = "userId") %>%
  select(-starts_with("document_id"))

glimpse(experiment_master)
```

## Covariate Balance Check

Check randomization frequencies across treatment arms.

```{r balance-check}
cat("--- Treatment Assignment ---\n")
treatment_counts <- experiment_master %>%
  distinct(userId, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  count(treatment)
print(treatment_counts)

cat("\n--- Covariate Balance ---\n")
balance_check <- experiment_master %>%
  distinct(userId, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  group_by(treatment) %>%
  summarize(
    n_users           = n(),
    avg_age           = mean(age, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_quant_exposure = mean(quantitativeExposure, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_puzzle_skill  = mean(puzzleSkill, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_puzzle_enjoy  = mean(puzzleEnjoyment, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_energy        = mean(energyLevel, na.rm = TRUE),
    pct_desktop       = mean(deviceType == "Desktop", na.rm = TRUE)
  )
print(balance_check)

cat("\n--- Gender Distribution by Treatment ---\n")
gender_dist <- experiment_master %>%
  distinct(userId, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  count(treatment, gender) %>%
  group_by(treatment) %>%
  mutate(pct = round(n / sum(n), 2))
print(gender_dist)
```

## Outcome Summary

```{r outcome-summary}
cat("--- Solve Rate by Treatment ---\n")
outcome_summary <- experiment_master %>%
  group_by(treatment) %>%
  summarize(
    n_rounds          = n(),
    solve_rate        = mean(isSolved, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_time_engaged  = mean(timeEngaged, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_attempts      = mean(attemptCount, na.rm = TRUE),
    skip_rate         = mean(didSkip, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_rage_clicks   = mean(rageClicks, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
print(outcome_summary)
```


```{r regression}
m1 <- lm(timeEngaged ~ treatment + puzzleSkill + age + quantitativeExposure + puzzleFrequency, data = experiment_master)
coeftest(m1)
```
